{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321225005A8AAB39C7FC30C032E6C"}"},"total":47},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597927239280067352","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"为数不多的纳米核心同人文了 节奏略快 但爽 主角敢杀敢做 重感情","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"纳米核心","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BA%B3%E7%B1%B3%E6%A0%B8%E5%BF%83&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741046050C032E6C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227597927239280067352%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227583684501016955929%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BA%B3%E7%B1%B3%E6%A0%B8%E5%BF%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769050850,"group_id":"7583684501016955929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"兴趣罢了，会更新的。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4H8IG4Iqch4gIKYKcaXndI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4e3c155f810547448a575e6edeb83a26~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615775&x-signature=sZaMh60ESgI0%2FfGSNm%2BmeaOus88%3D","user_id":"345682973307940","user_name":"蓝星第一小说家"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"345682973307940","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583684501016955929","book_info":{"abstract":"当虫洞的光芒吞没元星，第五代亚人战士米赛亚·密米尔，坠入了夜之城冰冷的钢铁丛林。这里没有他熟悉的基因困境，只有植入体寒光、公司霸权与街头永不停歇的生死游戏。
作为身负“奥丁”纳米装甲与电敏感天赋的异乡来客，米尔选择了一条截然不同的路。刻下自己的名字。一次源自“亚人十诫”的救援，让他与梦想成为传奇的曼恩小队、坚韧的黑客少女萨沙·雅科夫列娃，以及豪爽的准传奇杰克·威尔斯产生了命运的交织。他不仅救下了他们的生命，更以一种不依赖赛博改造的纯粹力量，撼动了这座城市的固有规则。
然而，夜之城不会忽视任何异数。公司的觊觎、中间人的算计、传奇佣兵亚当·重锤的铁拳相继袭来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1203d4153bd7d234ca364105793f243f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不会翻身的咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7583684501016955929","book_name":"赛博朋克：纳米核心","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#080830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5748人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586095100250292798","read_count":"5748","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"493556"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"239","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,星际,穿越,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1203d4153bd7d234ca364105793f243f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288605&x-signature=bDrtom8PSMXv1yjB4hs%2FLair%2FVE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1389392151717613","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"75"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321225005A8AAB39C7FC30C032E6C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后
